use_cases: Opening modal dialogs for project initialization workflows
Displaying form elements within overlay containers
Creating multi-step dialog flows with select inputs
Providing accessible dialog interfaces using Radix primitives
ai_summary: A Radix UI-based dialog component with integrated form elements including labels, select dropdowns, separators, and multiple button variants. Built as a project starter template with CVA-powered button styling and Tailwind CSS theming. Provides a clean, accessible modal interface for creating initialization workflows and multi-step dialogs with consistent design language.
